source_quote: It’s part of the growing Muse family of AI models that replace Meta’s Llama lineup. Alexandr Wang, who Meta hired to head up its Superintelligence Labs last year, says on Threads that Muse Image is “agentic,” meaning it works with its Muse Spark large language model “to reason through your prompt, search the web, and plan before it generates.” Meta is also planning to launch a Muse Video model, which Wang teased, saying it’s “competitive on prompt adherence, visual fidelity, temporal consistency.”

source_quote: Savi’s fees are also a bit unusual. It charges $8/month, discounted to $63/year, to cover an entire family, and puts no cap on the number of users. Or whoever else that the primary account holder wants to add and provide administrative support to.

subject: NVIDIA
object: Audex（Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B）统一音频-文本大语言模型
source_quote: NVIDIA has released Audex (Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B) , a unified audio-text large language model. It understands and generates both audio and speech. It also keeps the text intelligence of its backbone. The checkpoints, along with a smaller Audex-2B, are released under a noncommercial license.

subject: NVIDIA
object: Audex（Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B）统一音频-文本大语言模型
source_quote: Most multimodal models pay a text tax. When labs add audio or vision output, text benchmarks often drop. NVIDIA research team reports this even for speech-only output models. Audex is designed to avoid that regression.

subject: NVIDIA
object: Audex（Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B）统一音频-文本大语言模型

object: Audex（Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B）统一音频-文本大语言模型

source_quote: As AI costs continue to rise , companies are looking for ways to cut back. The most recent example is Microsoft, which has reportedly begun to deploy a cost-savings strategy by relying less on software from OpenAI and Anthropic and instead deploying its own in-house models.

object: AI 降本趋势，更多依赖自家模型
source_quote: Indeed, when it comes to two of its most widely used programs — Excel and Word — Microsoft has begun to use its homemade MAI models to respond to a certain percentage of user prompts, Bloomberg reported Tuesday. In the past, the company had advertised the fact that large parts of Office 365 are powered by models from both OpenAI and Anthropic .

object: gpt-realtime-2.1 和 gpt-realtime-2.1-mini 低延迟语音模型
source_quote: OpenAI has released two new Realtime models in its API. They are named gpt-realtime-2.1 and gpt-realtime-2.1-mini . Both target low-latency voice and multimodal experiences. The mini model is the notable part of this release. It is a mini reasoning model for realtime voice. It ships at the same cost as the earlier gpt-realtime-mini . OpenAI also reduced p95 latency by at least 25% across Realtime voice models. That reduction comes from improved caching.

subject: OXMIQ
object: $35 Million to Scale OxCore™ Architecture — OXMIQ
source_quote: OXMIQ Labs Inc. , a unified GPU and AI architecture company founded by Raja Koduri, today closed its $35 million Series A financing, bringing the company's total capital raised to $60 million. The funding will scale OxCore TM , OXMIQ's licensable GPU architecture that allows semiconductor companies and AI system builders to build custom AI silicon without a full chip program. The round was co-led by Fundomo and Samsung Catalyst Fund, with participation from MediaTek, AM Intelligence Labs, Pegatron Venture Capital, CDIB-TEN, Darwin Ventures, and Morgan Creek Digital, among other financial and strategic investors. OXMIQ's expertise spans the full AI stack, from renewable power and data center infrastructure to silicon IP, electron-to-token machines (ETMs TM ), along with the software that runs AI factories and agents.

subject: OXMIQ
object: $35 Million to Scale OxCore™ Architecture — OXMIQ
source_quote: "We are very excited to co-lead OXMIQ's financing round and back Raja Koduri and the strong team at OXMIQ. OXMIQ's novel AI core and software platform enable heterogeneous compute for efficient, custom inference solutions serving large-scale agentic workloads."

subject: OXMIQ
object: $35 Million to Scale OxCore™ Architecture — OXMIQ
source_quote: One Core, Three Engines

subject: OXMIQ
object: $35 Million to Scale OxCore™ Architecture — OXMIQ
source_quote: Token demand is outpacing the world's ability to build infrastructure to serve it. OXMIQ was founded to re-architect the GPU stack from Atoms to Agents TM , building the silicon IP, configurable systems and software platform that enable semiconductor companies and AI infrastructure builders to drive down the cost of intelligence at every layer of the stack.

subject: Ornn
object: $33M to help companies buy and sell AI compute as a commodity like oil - SiliconANGLE
source_quote: Ornn was founded by Massachusetts Institute of Technology graduates Kush Bavaria and Wayne Nelms, who published a blog post on X explaining that they’re building the world’s first compute marketplace. The company first developed an index that tracks the cost of graphics processing units, which are one of the most vital resources for AI applications. The goal is to bring more transparency to a compute market that’s plagued by supply limitations and unpredictable prices.

subject: Neocloud Together AI
object: $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation
source_quote: Together AI last raised a $305 million Series B at a $3.3 billion valua tion about 16 months ago. It actually came out of the gate well-funded, with a $102.5 million Series A funding round led by Kleiner Perkins with participation from Nvidia and Emergence Capital back in 2023.

subject: Neocloud Together AI
object: $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation
source_quote: Neoclouds have been hot commodities for VC investment more broadly, not just Together AI. Upscale AI raised a Series A plus in an extension totaling $500 million at a $2 billion valuation last month; TensorWave — which focuses on GPU clusters from AMD — raised a $350 million Series B at $1.55 billion valuation last month as well, to name just two recent examples.

subject: Norm Ai
object: $120 Million at a $1.2 Billion Valuation Led by Khosla Ventures to Deliver the Full-Stack Model for Legal AI
source_quote: NEW YORK , July 7, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Norm Ai raised a $120 million Series C at a $1.2 billion valuation, led by Khosla Ventures, the first institutional investor in OpenAI. Blackstone, Bain Capital Ventures (BCV), Craft Ventures, Coatue, Vanguard, New York Life, TIAA, Tony James (former President, Chief Operating Officer, and Executive Vice Chairman of Blackstone), Jeff Hammes (former Chairman of Kirkland & Ellis), and Fenwick LLP also participated, drawing a rare mix of financial, legal, and venture capital investors. The company has raised more than $260 million since its founding less than three years ago.

subject: Norm Ai
object: $120 Million at a $1.2 Billion Valuation Led by Khosla Ventures to Deliver the Full-Stack Model for Legal AI
source_quote: The Series C will accelerate hiring, expand practice area coverage, and advance Norm Ai's supervisory agents for regulated enterprise AI deployments.

subject: Norm Ai
object: $120 Million at a $1.2 Billion Valuation Led by Khosla Ventures to Deliver the Full-Stack Model for Legal AI
source_quote: Norm Ai builds agentic law, embedding law into AI agents. Its systems help govern how AI operates in high-stakes, regulated environments across a client base representing more than $30 trillion in combined assets under management. Norm Ai also powers Norm Law, the first AI-native law firm built for institutional clients. Norm Ai has raised more than $260 million from Khosla Ventures, Craft Ventures, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Blackstone, Vanguard, Citi, New York Life, TIAA, Henry R. Kravis, and Marc Benioff.

subject: Norm Ai
object: $120 Million at a $1.2 Billion Valuation Led by Khosla Ventures to Deliver the Full-Stack Model for Legal AI
source_quote: "AI will not transform regulated work until institutions trust it, and that trust is the hardest thing to earn in this market," said Samir Kaul, Managing Director at Khosla Ventures. "The most demanding buyers of legal services in the world already rely on Norm Ai. We led this round because John has built the only credible path to AI-native legal work at institutional scale."

source_quote: Competitors are circling the same problem from different angles. Scale AI, whose $14.3 billion investment from Meta valued it near $29 billion, supplies labelled data rather than interactive training environments. Poolside raised $500 million at a $3 billion valuation to build coding-focused foundation models. Reflection AI raised $130 million in seed funding for autonomous software engineering agents.

Peraton[x] TM will evolve the future of the human enterprise and deliver material implications to the efficiency and effectiveness of every government agency and operation. The technology does not replace people, it supercharges them.

subject: Peraton

source_quote: Peraton[x] TM transforms enterprise operations to unleash their full power

subject: Peraton
object: Peraton[x]™: The First True Enterprise Agentic AI Platform Built for the Nation’s Most Critical Operations and Missions
source_quote: Until Peraton[x] TM , no true enterprise agentic AI existed. Existing solutions treat AI as a tool embedded within systems rather than as a core operational capability. They require specially trained operators, take weeks or months to deploy, and are constrained in mission scope. Peraton[x] TM changes all of that.

subject: AI Voice Agents
object: AI Voice Agents Increased Specialty Care Program Enrollment Rates 340% in Real-World Clinical Setting
source_quote: "Healthcare has long known that personalized outreach from human care managers improves patient engagement, but scaling those efforts has been difficult and expensive, especially with specialties that require more complex answers and care," said RJ Ellis, PhD, lead study author and Principal AI Scientist at RadiantGraph. "This study provides evidence that advanced agents can help close that gap by reaching more patients, increasing appointment completion, and doing so safely alongside existing care teams."

subject: AI Voice Agents
object: AI Voice Agents Increased Specialty Care Program Enrollment Rates 340% in Real-World Clinical Setting
source_quote: Lack of patient engagement and non-adherence in specialty care creates severe operational and financial impacts for providers while harming patient health

subject: AI Voice Agents
object: AI Voice Agents Increased Specialty Care Program Enrollment Rates 340% in Real-World Clinical Setting
source_quote: AI voice agents can close this gap, but there have been no previous controlled evaluations of AI-initiated voice outreach conducted in a real-world setting

subject: AI Voice Agents
object: AI Voice Agents Increased Specialty Care Program Enrollment Rates 340% in Real-World Clinical Setting
source_quote: SAN FRANCISCO , July 7, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- RadiantGraph , an AI-powered proactive care platform designed specifically for the healthcare industry, today announced the publication of a peer-reviewed study in conjunction with the 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME), in Ottawa, Canada July 7-10, showing that AI-powered voice outreach increased appointment completion rates by 3.4x overall, including a 24.7x increase among patients who had created an account but not yet scheduled an appointment. It also enabled a 9x increase in outbound call volume compared to human agents. Equally important, no safety incidents or escalations were identified during the study.

source_quote: 这与 OpenAI、Anthropic、谷歌推出的多款闭源旗舰模型截然不同，后者核心代码与底层运行逻辑均属于厂商私有技术，不予对外开放。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 中国AI模型凭成本优势赢得美国企业青睐
source_quote: 在美国多家人工智能实验室上调旗舰模型词元（token）计费价格后，企业使用 AI 技术产生的成本大幅超出预期，而中国模型的性能进步恰好契合了市场的降本需求。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 中国AI模型凭成本优势赢得美国企业青睐
source_quote: IT之家注意到，聚合多家大模型、供开发者调用的平台 OpenRouter 数据显示：自 2 月 8 日起，美国企业调用中国 AI 模型产生的词元占比每周均超过 30%，峰值一度达到 46%；此前 12 个月该比例均值仅为 11%，2025 年上半年更是低至 4.5%。

subject: Anthropic
object: Anthropic 论文发现 Claude 内部存在类似人脑的"全局工作空间"结构
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 7 日消息，Anthropic 今天（7 月 7 日）在 X 平台发布推文，称最新研究表明 Claude 模型拥有“灵魂”， 且相关证据表明 AI 和人脑之间存在“趋同进化”（Convergent Evolution）。

subject: Anthropic
object: Anthropic 论文发现 Claude 内部存在类似人脑的"全局工作空间"结构
source_quote: 该论文主题为《大语言模型中的全局工作空间》，在 Claude 模型中发现类似神经科学中的“全局工作空间理论”（global workspace theory）的结构，并命名为 J-space。

subject: Anthropic
object: Anthropic 论文发现 Claude 内部存在类似人脑的"全局工作空间"结构
source_quote: IT之家注：在神经科学领域中，全局工作空间理论认为大量脑内活动处于后台自动运行状态，只有进入可被广泛共享的“工作空间”的信息，才会成为可描述、可保持、可推理的内容。

subject: Anthropic
object: Anthropic 论文发现 Claude 内部存在类似人脑的"全局工作空间"结构
source_quote: 在最新论文中，Anthropic 认为 Claude 模型内部也存在相应结构，信息进入一个可向全脑广播的特权空间后，才会变得可被有意识访问，官方将其命名为 J-space。

subject: AI law startup Norm
object: $120M, hits unicorn valuation
source_quote: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation

subject: AI law startup Norm
object: $120M, hits unicorn valuation
source_quote: AI law startup Norm on Tuesday said it has raised $120 million in a Series C funding round led by Khosla Ventures, valuing the almost three-year-old startup at $1.2 billion.

subject: AI law startup Norm
object: $120M, hits unicorn valuation
source_quote: Other investors in Norm’s Series C include Bain, Craft Ventures, Coatue, Vanguard, New York Life, TIAA, Tony James (former president and COO of Blackstone), Jeff Hammes (former chairman of Kirkland & Ellis), and Fenwick LLP. The fresh capital will be used to help build out the product and hire more attorneys.

subject: AI law startup Norm
object: $120M, hits unicorn valuation
source_quote: Norm has built an AI-native law firm, called Norm Law, that uses the company’s own AI agents, employs human attorneys to supervise them, and offers legal services to enterprise clients. It’s also building AI agents that can supervise other AI agents as they go about their tasks.

subject: AWS Marketplace
object: AI agents and tools from AWS Partners
source_quote: AWS Marketplace now offers AI agents and tools from AWS Partners, allowing customers to find and buy third-party AI agent solutions with streamlined procurement and multiple deployment options.
